name: @agiterra/wallet-extension-ci
description: CI variant of the Agiterra Wallet extension. Identical surface to @agiterra/wallet-extension but with NO Wire dependency. Wallets configured with mode:"wire" will throw at decision time. Use mode:"local-rpc" for Playwright-driven tests.

scripts.build: bun build src/background.ts --outfile=dist/background.js --target=browser --format=esm && bun build ../core/src/content-script.ts --outfile=dist/content-script.js --target=browser --format=iife && bun build ../core/src/inpage.ts --outfile=dist/inpage.js --target=browser --format=iife && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -R icons dist/icons 2>/dev/null || true

author: Tim Garthwaite <https://github.com/mividtim>
